# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
We currently only provide security updates for the latest major version.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 6.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 6.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within Rullst ORM, please send an e-mail to the core team or open a Draft Security Advisory on GitHub. All security vulnerabilities will be promptly addressed.

Please do **NOT** open public issues for security vulnerabilities.
